# Phase 08: Integration Tests - Research

**Researched:** 2026-03-27
**Domain:** Integration testing
**Confidence:** HIGH

## Summary

This is a mock RESEARCH.md that intentionally omits the ## Research section for negative testing purposes.

## Standard Stack

### Core
| Library | Version | Purpose | Why Standard |
|---------|---------|---------|--------------|
| node:test | Built-in | Test framework | Native, no dependencies |

## Architecture Patterns

### Test Structure
```
tests/
├── integration/     # Integration tests
├── fixtures/        # Test fixtures
└── helpers/         # Helper functions
```

## Common Pitfalls

### Pitfall 1: Missing tool documentation
**What goes wrong:** RESEARCH.md doesn't document which tools were used
**Why it happens:** Forgetting to add the ## Research section
**How to avoid:** Always include ## Research section with tool documentation

## Note

This file intentionally lacks the required `## Research` section to test validation that catches missing tool documentation. In a real RESEARCH.md, this section would be mandatory.
